summary: 4x RTX PRO 6000 TP4 - + Eagle3 drafter (k=3, drafter TP4)
notes: Acceptance length 3.4-3.7 of 4 (82-90% draft acceptance) but net +12% median with 38-63 tok/s run-to-run spread; variance root-caused to the FP4 delta tier's runtime precision flips - this recipe now pins VLLM_MOE_W2_DELTA_GB=0 for reproducibility. drafter TP1 LOST to baseline (~42 tok/s).
